title: Dyable Faces
description: Paint individual block faces using a bucket in your off-hand and a brush in your main hand. Crafting: resin, water, bucket, and dye. 450 uses per bucket.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/Qx6DymGm/dyable-faces.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
Dyeable Faces brings a precise painting mechanic to Minecraft. Instead of recoloring whole blocks, you can now paint specific faces to add depth and detail to your builds.

- Crafting: Create a Paint Bucket by combining resin, a water bottle, an empty bucket, and your choice of dye.

- How to use: Hold the bucket in your off-hand and the brush in your main-hand. Click to soak the brush in paint and start coloring individual block faces.

- Capacity: Each bucket is built for large projects, featuring a maximum of 450 uses.

- Cleaning: Break the block to remove paint or use a sponge to clear all paint within an 8-block radius.

![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/TwxJmrPk/paint.png)
